lang_translation_comment: Roman Urdu localization made by Gemini

GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_ASKALLOWPERSADS: Kya aap apne liye personalized ads dekhna allow karenge?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_ASKALLOWPERSADSEXPL: Is se ads aap ke liye aur relevant banenge aur aap ko pareshan nahi karenge (aap inhe sirf tab dekh sakte hain jab aap game mein reward hasil karna chahte hain)
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_BACKUPSEXPLANATION: Backup se aap apne current game world ko save aur revert kar sakte hain, jabki iska aapke account se judi currencies (Rubies) par koi asar nahi hota.
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_BREAKCODE: Weekly gift hasil karne ke liye code guess karein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_DOYOULIKEGAME: Kya aap ko game pasand aayi?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_FINDHINTS: Game ke andar hints talash karein ya...
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_GETMORECODESINDISCORD: Hamare Discord par mazeed codes hasil karein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_IMPORTNOTHING: Import karne ke liye kuch nahi
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_INF_USEMARKET_END: mein bech kar aur paise hasil karne ka sochein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_MAKEBACKUPS: Aap apne tower ka backup le sakte hain taake baad mein load kar sakein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_NEWSET: CONTEST SHURU KARNE KE LIYE TAIYAR!
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_PENDINGMSG: Purchase karne ke liye shukriya! Jab transaction process ho jayega, toh purchase available ho jayega.
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_RATEGAME: Kya aap please ek public review chhodenge taake aur log is game ko dhoondh sakein?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_REWARD2TESTER: Development ke dauran hum ne game core change kiya hai, isliye aap fresh start kar rahe hain. Lekin hum aapko ek boost de rahe hain taake aap apni progress jaldi wapas pa sakein.
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_SELECTSLOT: Save karne ke liye slot chunein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_SMALLQUESTION: Main aapse ek chota sawal poochna chahta hu...
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_TELLWHY: Kya aap ise aur mazedar banane ke kuch tareeqe tajweez kar sakte hain?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_THANKS2TESTER: Is game ke sab se pehle tester banne ke liye aapka bahut bahut shukriya!
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_TODOMAX: Aapke paas maximum tasks hain. Naye hasil karne ke liye inhe pura karein ya hata dein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_TODOREPLACEIN: Aap task ko replace kar payenge in:
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CAP_TRYINGLOADBON: Agla bonus load karne ki koshish kar rahe hain
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CODEERR_ALREADYUSED: Aapne yeh code pehle hi use kar liya hai
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CODEERR_EXPIRED: Yeh code expire ho gaya hai ya abhi active nahi hai
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CODEERR_NOEFFECT: Current game state par yeh code koi asar nahi karega. Baraye meharbani baad mein try karein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CODEERR_ONLYNUMBERS: Code mein sirf numbers aur English letters hone chahiye
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CODEERR_WRONGPLAYER: Yeh gift kisi aur player ke liye hai
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CODEERR_WRONGVERSION: Yeh code naye game version ke liye hai. Baraye meharbani game ko update karein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_CODEERR_WRONGWORLD: Yeh code kisi aur game world ke liye hai (shayad)
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_DEC_WAIT_TIME: Aap intezaar ka waqt kam kar sakte hain
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_DISCORDSUGGESTIONS: Aap hamari community mein results aur current suggestions check kar sakte hain
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_GDPR_APPLE_ADD_ALT: Jaise aap aage badhenge, aap apni tracking preferences chun payenge
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_GDPR_EXPLANATION: Game players ka data (ads cookies aur usage stats) use karta hai gameplay ko behtar banane aur relevant ads dikhane ke liye taake game free rahe. Baraye meharbani hamare terms of use aur privacy policy ko accept karein (ya agar aap age of consent se chote hain toh apne legal guardian ko agree karne dein).
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_LASTLOADATTEMPT: Pichli baar ek error aaya tha
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSGCAP_CREDITSAUTHORS: Game by Airapport team Alexey Izvalov & Nadiia Serbina © 2020 Tamam huqooq mehfooz hain
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSGCAP_ERRORLOADING: File load karte waqt error aaya
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSGCAP_NEXTRUNBOOSTS: Agle run mein aapko ye boosts milenge
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSGCAP_RESTART_BOOST_CAP: Aapke paas abhi ye boosts hain:
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSGCAP_RESTART_INFORMATION: Mubarak ho, aapne restart kar liya hai!
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSGCAP_RESTART_QUESTION: Kya aap sach mein building ko restart karna chahte hain?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSGCAP_VICTORY: Jeet! Aapne sabse oonche level ko paar kar liya hai! Aap is limit ke aage bhi bana sakte hain, ya Airapport ki dusri games khel sakte hain
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_CLIPBOARD: Text file clipboard mein copy ho gayi hai. Ise kahin store karein ya khud ko email karein taake baad mein tower restore ho sake
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_EMAILBODY: (Baraye meharbani, ye email dev@airapport.com ko bhejein)
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_GAINMOREAFTERADS: Kya aap ads dekh kar aur hasil karna chahenge?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_GAINMORESKIPADS: Kya aap (bina ads ke) aur hasil karna chahenge?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_HOWTOIMPROVE: Game ko behtar banane ke tajaveez
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_ISLOADOK: Kya sab kuch theek se load hua?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_MUSTIMPORTFROMCLIPBOARD: Import karne se pehle save text string ko select karein aur clipboard mein copy karein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_NOTASAVETEXT: Jo file aapne copy ki hai, wo sahi save file nahi hai
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_REWARD_READY: Aapko ek unexpected gift mila hai! Check karein, kya hai
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_SLOTTAKENCONFIRM: Yeh slot pehle se bhara hai. Kya aap sach mein ise overwrite karna chahte hain?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_SORRYSAVE: Maaf karein, hum save load nahi kar paye
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_TEXTAFTERSCREENSHOTOK: Ab players community aapki achievement dekh sakti hai
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_WRONGSAVEOPTIONS: Game restart karne se pehle aap yeh kar sakte hain:
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_MSG_YOUCANREVERT2BACKUP: Agar aap chahein, toh pichle save par wapas ja sakte hain
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_PHRASE_ARTIFACTS_END: artifacts. Check karein kya aap aur khareed sakte hain
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_REP_TASK_QUEST: Kya aap sach mein is task ko replace karna chahte hain?
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_REWARDSNOTLOAD: Maazrat, inaam yafta ishtiharat load nahi kiye gaye.
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_SAVEDATA: Aapki madad ka shukriya! Yeh aapka save data hai. Baraye meharbani isko pura select karein (long press -> select all), copy karein (long press -> copy) aur developer ko email bhejein: dev@airapport.com
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_SEND: Lagta hai pichli baar game crash ho gaya tha. Aap iss save ko phir se load kar sakte hain ya data developer ko bhej sakte hain. Hum ise dekh kar jaldi theek kar denge. Agar aap wait nahi karna chahte, toh game ko bilkul shuru se bhi restart kar sakte hain.
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_SEND_COPIEDSAVEDATA: Aapka save data text clipboard mein copy ho gaya hai
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_SEND_SAVEDATA: Baraye meharbani ise developer ko email karein: dev@airapport.com
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_TRYAGAIN: Baraye meharbani baad mein try karein
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_UMP_ADSONLYREW: Game aapki ijazat ke bina ads nahi dikhata
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_UMP_CONSENTEXPL: Baraye meharbani rewards wale ads load karne ke liye apni ijazat dein.
GROUP_general_interface.TXID_VOTERESULT: Shukriya! Aapka vote count ho gaya hai.

GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_4HSPACE_DESC: Contest mode '4 hours' mein floor 9 pura karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_ALIENTRADE_DESC: Mars delegation ki 250 trade visits puri karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_BABEL31DEVGREET_DESC: 31 floors pure karne par developer ka greeting message hasil karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_CONTENDER_DESC: Sabhi contest modes mein kam se kam 1 floor pura karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_DEERSELLER_DESC: Reindeer se goods bech kar 2025 Decillion kamayein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_ECOLOFYYES_DESC: Ped katne ke baad forest ko puri tarah restore karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_ECOLOGYNO_DESC: Forest ke sabhi ped kaat dein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_ELEPHANTTRANSP_DESC: Hathi se 1 Sextillion stone transport karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_GALILEOAPPLES_DESC: Galileo se tower se 1000 apples girvayein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_GUNSFREE_DESC: Bina cannon kharide 16th floor tak pahunchein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_HEADSTART_DESC: Restart karne ke turant baad Babel tower ke 12 floors payein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_MARKETSELL_DESC: Market mein goods bech kar 1M kamayein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_MOONMULT_DESC: Moon Crystal multiplicator se 500 bricks payein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_QUICKHAND_DESC: Tower ki khidkiyon se 50 bonuses catch karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_SUPERCLICKER_DESC: Clicking power par x131072 ka bonus payein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_TIMEFLY_DESC: Tower se 5 din dur rehne ke baad (total) offline earnings collect karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_UFOTRANSPORT_DESC: UFO ke zariye 100 Decillion stone deliver karein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_ZEPPELIN1000_DESC: Tourists ke saath 1000 zeppelin flights aane dein
GROUP_tower_achievements.TXID_ACH_ZEPPELIN10_DESC: Tourists ke saath 10 zeppelin flights aane dein

GROUP_tower_artifacts.TXID_AFT_DESC_RUBIES_100: Aapki machines ki production boost kar sakta hai
GROUP_tower_artifacts.TXID_CURR_DESC_ADSSKIPS: Aap ads dekhna skip kar sakte hain aur fir bhi bonus milega
GROUP_tower_artifacts.TXID_CURR_DESC_GEMS: Powerful boosts ke liye use kiye ja sakte hain

GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_CAP_RUBYBOOST_QUESTION: Kya aap _0_ ko _1_ se boost karna chahenge _2_ de kar?
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_CAP_SELECTRUBYBOOSTEDMACHINE: Rubies se boost karne ke liye machines chunein
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_CAP_TOWERCONTESTENDED: Aapne successfully tower pura kar liya hai, time laga:
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_CAP_TOWERFLOORS_BEG: Aapne building puri kar li hai:
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_CAP_UNLOCKCONTESTCONDITIONS: Ise unlock karne ke liye 10 Golden Bricks kamayein
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_MSGCAP_FUTUREGB_START: Agar aap abhi restart karenge toh aapko milenge
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_TODOEXPL: Tasks pure karein aur valuable resources kamayein
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_MSG_BRICKSBUYCONFIRMATION_BEG: Kya aap sach mein kharch karna chahte hain
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_MSG_DOYOUREALLYWANTUNLOCK: Kya aap sach mein naya tower unlock karna chahte hain?
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_MSG_LEVEL_SPACE: Aap Space mein pahunch gaye hain!
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_MSG_LEVEL_SPACE_ACTION: Aap yahan kaunsi machines dekhna chahenge? Humein batayein!
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_MSG_VIC: Maine Babel Tower pura kar liya hai!
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_PHRASE_RESTARTINFO_END: Golden Bricks agar aap abhi restart karein
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_PHRASE_RESTARTINFO_NEXT_END: agar aap ek aur floor pura karke restart karein
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_SEND_BABELTOWERVICTORY: Humne Babel Tower pura kar liya hai!
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_SEND_SPACEMACHINESCAP: Babel Tower ke liye Space machines!
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_SEND_SPACEMACHINESTEXT: Agle floors ke liye mere ideas:
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_SET_AUTOBUY: Restart ke baad automatically upgrades kharidein (resources ka 0.01% kharch karke)
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_VOTETOWER: Vote: Aap game mein agla kaunsa tower banana chahte hain?
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_WORLDDESC_BABELTOWER: Tower ko aasman aur uske aage tak banayein!
GROUP_tower_game_elements.TXID_WORLDDESC_BABELTOWER_CONTEST: Limited time mein sabse ooncha tower banane mein dusre players ke saath compete karein

GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_ASTRBRICKSCONV: Asteroids ko bricks mein convert karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_ASTRCATCHER: Space mein asteroids ko catch karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_BERTH: Flying machines par tourists ko attract karta hai aur paise kamata hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_BRICKSSTORAGE: Bricks ko store karta hai. Bricks yahan se bechi ja sakti hain
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_BUNGEEJUMPER: Khidkiyon se paise collect karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_CAMEL: Kharidne ke liye goods collect karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_CANNON: Tower ke upper floors par bricks shoot karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_CARAWANSARAI: Aapke goods ko achhe daam par kharidta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_CLOUD: Neeche zameen par paani dalta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_CRANE: Tower ke higher levels tak bricks le jaata hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_DRUMMER: Transporter ke tezi se kaam karne ke liye rhythm banata hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_ELEPHANT: Insaan se kahin zyada stone transport karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_FIELD: Elephant ko khilane ke liye ghaas ugate hain
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_FOREST: Wood ka source. Khatam ho sakta hai. Dheere badhta hai, paani milne par tez
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_GALILEO: Balcony se apples girata hai, dekhta hai ki wo kaise girti hain aur Science generate karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_GEMSLAB: Zameen ke neeche explore karta hai aur keemti gems dhoondhta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_GOODUFO: Sabse advanced technology ka use karke stone transport karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_HAYSTACK: Isme elephant ke liye hay (sookhi ghaas) hoti hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_HELICOPTER: Zyada stone mine karne ke liye rocks ko explode karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_HELICOPTERBALCONY: Helicopter ko refuel aur reload karne ki jagah
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_IRRIGATOR: Field se grass production badhata hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_LUMBERBRMAKER: Alien technology ka use karke planks ko bricks mein convert karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_LUMBERMILL: Wood ko Planks mein convert karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_MOONSTONETOWER: Agar yeh building level se ooncha hai toh extra bricks banata hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_MOONSWING: Moon tower ki growth ki keemat kam karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_PLANKSSTORAGE: Planks store karta hai. Planks yahan se beche ja sakte hain
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_PROPAGANDA: Active hone par workers ko aur efficiently kaam karne ke liye inspire karta hai. Operate karne ke liye alag alag resources chahiye
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_PUMP: Well se apne aap paani pump karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_QUARRYSTORAGE: Stone store karta hai. Stone yahan se becha ja sakta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_SAW: Stone ko Bricks mein convert karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_SPACEHIVE: Udne wale aur machines ko click karne wale drones ko charge karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_SPACEPORTAL: Orbit se asteroids ko teleport karta hai taki aap unhe bech sakein
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_SPUTNIK: Sattelite jab planet ke chakkar lagata hai tab Science generate karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_STARS: Aasman mein sirf dots nahi hain
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_SUNBATTERY: Kisi specific facility ko energy bhejta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_TELESCOPE: Taaron (stars) ko dekhta hai aur Science generate karta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_UFOBASE: UFO ko recharge karta hai taki agle flight ke liye jaldi taiyar ho sake
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_WATEREXTRACTOR: Zameen ke andar se paani nikalta hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_WATERWELL: Isme paani hai. Khatam ho sakta hai. Paani apne aap wapas aata hai (baarish mein jaldi)
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_WOODSTORAGE: Wood store karta hai. Wood yahan se bechi ja sakti hai
GROUP_tower_machines.TXID_MACH_DESC_ZEPPELIN: Aapke shandaar tower ko dekhne ke liye door se aata hai

GROUP_tower_messages_from_game_elements.TXID_CAP_SELECTBOOSTEDMACHINE: Energy bhejne ke liye facility chunein

GROUP_tower_rewards.TXID_REW_DECWAITTIME: Intezaar ka waqt kam ho gaya

GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_AUTOCLICKER: Aap shayad autoclicker ko kisi object par rakhna chahein, is par depend karta hai ki abhi sabse zyada power kisko chahiye.
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_AUTOCLICKERCONGR: Jab yeh active hota hai toh aap kisi machine par click kar sakte hain aur yeh aapke saath kaam karega
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_AUTOCLICKERSTART: Ab aap autoclicker on kar sakte hain
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_AUTOTRANSFERSTONE: Stone ko Saw tak bhejne ke liye Storage par tap karein
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_AUTOTRANSFERWOOD: Wood ko Lumbermill tak bhejne ke liye Storage par tap karein
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_CHOP: Wood kaatne ke liye Forest par tap karein. Kaatna apne aap chalta rahega
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_CRANE: Bas is par tap karein aur yeh bahut tezi se kaam karna shuru kar dega.
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_CRANENEEDED: Humein aur ooncha tower banane ke liye ek crane chahiye
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_CRANE_CAP: Kya aapko pata hai ke aap crane ki speed badha sakte hain?
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_DRAGWATER: Forest mein paani laane aur naye ped ugane ke liye Water Well par tap karein
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_HIGHTOWERMOREBRICKS: Tower ke oopari floors ke liye bahut saari bricks chahiye
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_LAB_CAP: Jald hi aapke paas ek laboratory kharidne ke liye kafi science hogi!
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_LAB_SCROLL: Yeh aapke tower ke basement mein hoga. Isme aapki aage ki progress ke liye bahut powerful upgrades hain
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_LUMBERMILL: Planks jaldi banane ke liye lumbermill par tap karein. Kaam apne aap chalta rahega
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_MARKET: Aap resources market mein bech sakte hain
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_MINE: Stone mine karne ke liye Quarry par tap karein. Mining apne aap chalti rahegi
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_MINEMORE: Cycle chalate rehne ke liye aur stone mine karein
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_MORERESTART: Kyunki Golden Bricks 3 game parameters ko badhate hain: production, clicker power aur market prices, inka asar bahut bada hota hai. Aur Golden Bricks hasil karne ke liye apni building ko restart karne ka yeh sahi waqt hai.
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_MORERESTART_CAP: Tower banane ke liye Golden Bricks hasil karna bahut zaroori hai
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_NOCLIKNEEDS: Zyada click karne ki zaroorat nahi hai ;)
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_NOCLIKNEEDSXPL: Is game mein ek inbuilt autoclicker hai. Bas object par ek baar click karein aur woh kaam karna shuru kar dega. Is beech aap resources bechein ya upgrades karein.
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_PRODUCEBRICKS: Bricks jaldi banane ke liye tent par tap karein. Kaam apne aap chalta rahega
GROUP_tower_tutorial.TXID_MSGCAP_TUT_RESTART: Check karein ke building restart karne par aapko kaunse bonuses milenge

GROUP_tower_upgrades.TXID_UPGRNAME_RESTARTGB: Restart ke baad extra Golden Bricks bonus
GROUP_tower_upgrades.TXID_UPGRNAME_RESTARTMONEY: Restart ke baad bache hue paise
GROUP_tower_upgrades.TXID_UPGRNAME_RESTARTTIME: Restart ke baad offline time bonus
GROUP_tower_upgrades.TXID_UPGRNAME_TIMECLICKERBOTS: Ek charge par kaam karne ka waqt
GROUP_tower_upgrades.TXID_UPGRNAME_UFONUMFLIGHT: Ek charge par transports ki tadad

GROUP_www_airapport_games.TXID_GAMEDESC_FARMANDMINE: Sabziyan ugayein aur resources mine karein
GROUP_www_airapport_games.TXID_GAMEDESC_IDLETOWERBUILDER: Tower ko aasman aur uske aage tak banayein!
GROUP_www_airapport_games.TXID_GAMEDESC_STEAMPUNK: Kamaal ki machines aur steampunk gadgets
